metadata.description: Criar entrypoint.sh que inicia nginx em background e dnsmasq em foreground com tratamento correto de sinais SIGTERM/SIGINT para graceful shutdown.
metadata.goal: Script de inicialização do container all-in-one com gestão correta de processos
acceptanceCriteria: dnsmasq inicia em foreground (mantém container vivo)
trap SIGTERM/SIGINT para matar ambos os processos

summary: Created entrypoint.sh (chmod +x) with nginx background, dnsmasq foreground, SIGTERM/SIGINT trap for graceful shutdown, and exit code propagation. Includes test_entrypoint.sh with 10 assertions (all pass). Syntax validated with bash -n and sh -n.
